name: checkpoint-documentation-tool
description: Check Point Documentation Tool Service - API integration with Check Point Documentation Tool

options.description: Client ID for authentication with Documentation Tool
options.help: Client ID for Check Point Documentation Tool authentication. To obtain: log in to the Infinity Portal → API Keys → New → New User API Key → copy the generated Client ID

options.description: Secret Key for authentication with Documentation Tool
options.help: Secret Key for Check Point Documentation Tool authentication. Generated alongside the Client ID — copy and store it securely at creation time as it will not be shown again

options.description: Authentication URL from the API key creation dialog
options.help: Paste the Authentication URL shown when creating your API key (e.g. https://cloudinfra-gw.portal.checkpoint.com/auth/external). The path suffix is stripped automatically so you can copy it directly from the portal

options.description: Documentation Tool region: EU, US, STG, or LOCAL
options.help: Alternative to --auth-url. Region code for your deployment: EU, US, STG, or LOCAL. Use this if you know your region and prefer not to copy the full authentication URL
